name: Pizza Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients into the breadmaker in the order listed.
2. Allow the breadmaker to knead and let rise slightly before removing, approximately 20 to 25 minutes.
3. Remove the dough from the breadmaker before the bake cycle starts.
Note: I use the DAK Autobakery on the white bread setting to make this dough. After removal, place it on a lightly floured cutting board and cover with a clean moist towel to rise an additional 30 minutes or so before forming onto the pizza tray.
